summary: Well-recorded soundboard capture of a lively second set, though track‑listing quirks detract slightly.
review: Reviewers praise the clear, sweet audio and describe the show as well‑played with a particularly lively second set. One reviewer gives the performance a 4.5/5 rating, while another notes confusing track labels that make navigation difficult. Overall the music shines, but metadata errors keep it from being flawless.

ai_rating.rationale: One strong positive review (5 stars) highlights excellent sound and performance; a second brief negative note flags track‑listing problems, giving mixed overall feedback from only two reviews.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as well‑recorded and "pretty sweet"; no audio defects mentioned, only metadata/track‑listing errors.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set called lively and well‑played; overall show solid though missing U.S. Blues which some fans missed.
